match_nodes.description: Payment Services Act — payment/crypto-asset information security obligations

data.notes: Act No. 59 of 2009, effective April 2010, most recently amended by Act No. 66 of 2025 (stablecoin/EPI provisions, effective June 2026). Chapters cover Prepaid Payment Instruments, Funds Transfer Services, Crypto-Asset Exchange, Electronic Payment Instruments (stablecoins), and Funds Transfer Transaction Clearing. Article 21 requires prepaid-instrument issuers to take measures against information leakage/loss/damage and ensure security management; Article 21-3 requires user-complaint handling and protection measures. Japan's core statute for data/security controls over consumer payment credentials, e-money, and virtual-currency custody.
